des: Leo Rivas walks. Randy Arozarena scores. Brendan Donovan to 2nd. Wild pitch by pitcher Joey Cantillo.
Victor Robles flies out sharply to right fielder CJ Kayfus. Randy Arozarena to 3rd.
Brendan Donovan singles on a fly ball to center fielder Steven Kwan. Randy Arozarena to 2nd.
Randy Arozarena singles on a ground ball to catcher David Fry.
Cal Raleigh singles on a line drive to center fielder Steven Kwan.
Rob Refsnyder pops out to first baseman Kyle Manzardo in foul territory.
Cole Young called out on strikes.
Leo Rivas flies out to center fielder Steven Kwan.
Victor Robles doubles (1) on a line drive to left fielder Angel Martínez. Brendan Donovan scores.
Brendan Donovan grounds into a force out, second baseman Daniel Schneemann to shortstop Brayan Rocchio. Randy Arozarena out at 2nd. Brendan Donovan to 1st.
Randy Arozarena challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Randy Arozarena walks.
Josh Naylor grounds out, second baseman Daniel Schneemann to first baseman Kyle Manzardo.
Cal Raleigh called out on strikes.
Rob Refsnyder flies out to right fielder CJ Kayfus.
